questionHtml: State the feature of the molecules responsible for the absorption of light.
markschemeHtml:
conjugated C=C/carbon–carbon double bonds

OR

«multiple» alternating C=C/carbon–carbon double bonds

OR

«extensive electron» conjugation/delocalization

OR

«many» fused/conjugated aromatic/benzene rings

[1 mark]

meta.title: State the feature of the molecules responsible for the absorption of light.
